data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifying user decision-making by reducing choices at any given point.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designing for efficient interaction by considering the size and distance of clickable elements.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Creating visual coherence through principles like proximity, similarity, and continuity.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limiting the amount of information presented at once to enhance comprehension and retention.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users spend most of their time on other sites and prefer your site to work the same way.
